// Variables used by Scriptable.
// These must be at the very top of the file. Do not edit.
// icon-color: pink; icon-glyph: magic;
const w = new WebView();

const html = `
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>ZORO HEAD V1000 — MAHAKAAL SUPER EDITION</title>

<style>
  :root {
    --bg:#0b0b0d;
    --card:#121216;
    --primary:#ef4444;
    --text:#f8fafc;
    --muted:#9ca3af;
    --radius:18px;
  }
  body{
    margin:0;
    font-family:-apple-system,Roboto;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at top,rgba(239,68,68,.2),transparent),var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    padding:24px;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .panel{
    width:100%;
    max-width:420px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.03),rgba(255,255,255,.01));
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:20px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  }
  h1{
    text-align:center;
    font-size:22px;
    font-weight:900;
    color:var(--primary);
    margin:0 0 16px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .section{
    background:var(--primary);
    font-weight:700;
    padding:8px 12px;
    border-radius:12px;
    margin-top:14px;
  }
  .checkbox{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;}
  .checkbox input{width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--primary);}
  .box{
    margin-top:16px;
    padding:12px;
    background:#0f1115;
    border-radius:12px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  }
  .log{
    height:160px;
    margin-top:14px;
    padding:8px;
    white-space:pre-wrap;
    overflow-y:auto;
    font-family:ui-monospace;
    font-size:12px;
    background:#0f1115;
    border-radius:12px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  }
  .progress{height:10px;background:#1a1c22;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:12px;}
  .bar{height:100%;width:0%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--primary),#f87171);}
  .btn{
    margin-top:18px;
    width:100%;
    padding:14px;
    border:none;
    background:#2563eb;
    border-radius:12px;
    font-size:16px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:#fff;
    cursor:pointer;
  }
</style>
</head>

<body>
<div class="panel">

  <h1>ZORO HEAD V1000<br>MAHAKAAL SUPER EDITION</h1>

  <div class="section">SUPER MODOS</div>
  <div class="checkbox"><input id="superAimbot" type="checkbox"> Super Aimbot</div>
  <div class="checkbox"><input id="super3HS" type="checkbox"> 3× Headshot 🃏☠️</div>
  <div class="checkbox"><input id="superMagic" type="checkbox"> Super Magic Bullet</div>
  <div class="checkbox"><input id="superLock" type="checkbox"> Super Headlock</div>
  <div class="checkbox"><input id="mahakaal" type="checkbox"> Mahakaal Mode</div>

  <div class="box">
    <label style="font-weight:700;">Headshot Ajuste: <span id="lblHS">50</span>%</label>
    <input id="hsRange" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="50" />
  </div>

  <div id="logBox" class="log">LISTO PARA INICIAR...</div>
  <div class="progress"><div id="bar" class="bar"></div></div>

  <button class="btn" id="btnInject">ACTIVAR</button>
</div>

<script>
(function(){

  const logBox = document.getElementById('logBox');
  const bar = document.getElementById('bar');
  const hsRange = document.getElementById('hsRange');
  const lblHS = document.getElementById('lblHS');

  hsRange.addEventListener('input',()=> lblHS.textContent = hsRange.value);

  function log(t){
    logBox.textContent += "\\n" + t;
    logBox.scrollTop = logBox.scrollHeight;
  }

  // ================ MAHAKAAL ENGINE VALUES ================
  let hs = 0n;
  let bullets = 0n;
  let cycle = 0n;

  const BASE = 10n ** 20n;
  const MAX = 10n ** 200n;

  function calcBoost(){
    let multi = BigInt(hsRange.value);

    if(document.getElementById('super3HS').checked) multi *= 3n;
    if(document.getElementById('superMagic').checked) multi *= 5n;
    if(document.getElementById('superLock').checked) multi *= 8n;
    if(document.getElementById('mahakaal').checked) multi *= 15n;

    return multi;
  }

  const shiva = [
    "🕉️ MAHAKAAL SHAKTI ACTIVADA",
    "🔱 TERCER OJO ENFOCADO",
    "🔥 TANDAV AIM CALIBRADO",
    "🌑 DARK MATTER LOCK",
    "💀 VOID PRECISION 100%"
  ];

  function chant(){ log("⚡ " + shiva[Math.floor(Math.random()*shiva.length)]); }

  async function cycleRun(){
    while(hs < MAX){
      const boost = calcBoost();

      hs += BASE * boost;
      bullets += BASE * boost;
      cycle++;

      chant();
      log("🎯 Headshots: " + hs);
      log("🔫 Bullets: " + bullets);
      log("🌀 Cycle: " + cycle);

      await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,50));
    }

    log("🖤 MAHAKAAL DOMINIO COMPLETO — END");
  }

  async function start(){
    logBox.textContent = "Cargando módulos...";
    bar.style.width = "0%";

    const steps=[12,30,55,78,90,100];
    for(let p of steps){
      bar.style.width = p + "%";
      log("⚙️ Procesando... " + p + "%");
      await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,350));
    }

    log("🔥 MAHAKAAL SUPER ENGINE ACTIVADO!");
    cycleRun();
  }

  document.getElementById('btnInject').addEventListener('click', start);

})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
`;

await w.loadHTML(html);
await w.present();
